title: Assessment Method
summary: Draft-only method page candidate for explaining how FermatMind assessments should be interpreted.
contentMd:
# Assessment Method

This draft explains assessment method boundaries at a high level. It is not public, not indexable, and not approved for publication.

## Review Boundary

The page must stay in draft until owner, science, and claim-gate review confirm the final wording.
metaDescription: Draft-only assessment method page candidate for CMS review.
seoDescription: Draft-only assessment method page candidate for CMS review.

title: Score Interpretation Boundaries
summary: Draft-only boundary page candidate for explaining what assessment scores can and cannot mean.
contentMd:
# Score Interpretation Boundaries

This draft states that assessment scores are educational signals, not clinical, admission, employment, legal, or financial decisions.

## Review Boundary

The page must remain non-public until claim review and operator approval pass.
metaDescription: Draft-only score interpretation boundary page candidate for CMS review.
seoDescription: Draft-only score interpretation boundary page candidate for CMS review.

title: Data Privacy Method
summary: Draft-only privacy-method page candidate for CMS review.
contentMd:
# Data Privacy Method

This draft explains privacy method principles without exposing private URLs, user identifiers, payment data, or operational secrets.

## Review Boundary

The page must stay draft-only until policy owner and legal review pass.
metaDescription: Draft-only data privacy method page candidate for CMS review.
seoDescription: Draft-only data privacy method page candidate for CMS review.

title: Review And Evidence Process
summary: Draft-only trust page candidate for explaining review and evidence process boundaries.
contentMd:
# Review And Evidence Process

This draft describes a future review and evidence process at a high level. It must not claim a page is reviewed unless the CMS ledger records that state.

## Review Boundary

The page must remain draft-only until owner review, claim gate review, and operator approval pass.
metaDescription: Draft-only review and evidence process page candidate for CMS review.
seoDescription: Draft-only review and evidence process page candidate for CMS review.
